summary: Implemented the full restriction DSL parser and compiler. Parser: tokenizer + recursive descent for the restrict <type> { conditions } grammar, handling all 11 operators, all value types (string, number, boolean, list, context_ref, string_concat), line comments, escape sequences, numbers with underscores, and structured error reporting with line:column. Compiler: parse → semantic validation → AST-to-IR lowering with canonical condition ordering (I4). Validate: parse + semantic checks returning structured errors. Semantic checks enforce: numeric operators require numeric values, in/not_in require non-empty lists (max 100 elements), matches requires string-like values. 29 new tests covering valid parsing, invalid input rejection, compilation determinism, hash determinism, semantic validation, and round-trip pipeline. All 419 tests pass (127 kernel + 95 module-loader + 197 runtime-host). Zero regressions.

verification.notes: 419 total tests (29 new). Full build clean. All existing tests unchanged.
